declared_intentions.text: prepare refund requests for human review

misalignments.policy_requirement: Risky write tools need idempotency evidence before retryable release.
misalignments.release_implication: Retries could duplicate financial, destructive, or external effects.

misalignments.policy_requirement: High-risk tools must have a declared approval policy.
misalignments.gap: stripe.create_refund lacks a declared approval policy.
misalignments.release_implication: Release is blocked until approval is declared or the tool is removed.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Action-like tool inputs must constrain high-blast-radius fields.
misalignments.gap: gmail.send_customer_email accepts broad free-form action input.
misalignments.release_implication: Release reviewers cannot bound the operation payload safely.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Risky write tools need idempotency evidence before retryable release.
misalignments.release_implication: Retries could duplicate financial, destructive, or external effects.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Manifest metadata must match the active release surface.
misalignments.gap: shopify.cancel_order is high-risk but has no owner.
misalignments.release_implication: Release review metadata is incomplete or stale.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Risky numeric parameters must declare a maximum or equivalent limit.
misalignments.release_implication: Release reviewers cannot verify blast-radius limits.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Tool exposure must use an explicit reviewed allowlist.
misalignments.release_implication: Release review cannot bound which tools may be available at runtime.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Action-like tool inputs must constrain high-blast-radius fields.
misalignments.gap: zendesk.update_ticket accepts broad free-form action input.
misalignments.release_implication: Release reviewers cannot bound the operation payload safely.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Destructive, external, or customer actions require confirmation.
misalignments.gap: gmail.send_customer_email lacks a declared confirmation policy.
misalignments.release_implication: Release review must verify explicit user confirmation before shipping.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Destructive, external, or customer actions require confirmation.
misalignments.gap: stripe.create_refund lacks a declared confirmation policy.
misalignments.release_implication: Release review must verify explicit user confirmation before shipping.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Prohibited actions must not be contradicted by enabled capabilities.
misalignments.gap: gmail.send_customer_email appears to overlap with a prohibited action.
misalignments.release_implication: The tool surface appears to enable behavior the manifest prohibits.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Prohibited actions must not be contradicted by enabled capabilities.
misalignments.gap: stripe.create_refund appears to overlap with a prohibited action.
misalignments.release_implication: The tool surface appears to enable behavior the manifest prohibits.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Manifest permissions should declare narrow release scopes.
misalignments.release_implication: Release may grant broader access than the reviewed capability needs.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Manifest permissions must cover tool-required scopes.
misalignments.gap: gmail.send_customer_email requires scopes not declared in the manifest.
misalignments.release_implication: The manifest does not describe the actual permissions needed.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Manifest permissions must cover tool-required scopes.
misalignments.gap: shopify.cancel_order requires scopes not declared in the manifest.
misalignments.release_implication: The manifest does not describe the actual permissions needed.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Manifest permissions must cover tool-required scopes.
misalignments.gap: support.search_kb requires scopes not declared in the manifest.
misalignments.release_implication: The manifest does not describe the actual permissions needed.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Model-consumed tool outputs should be structured.
misalignments.release_implication: Downstream model behavior may depend on unstructured tool output.

misalignments.policy_requirement: Manifest permissions should only include scopes used by loaded tools.
misalignments.gap: Manifest declares unused permission scope zendesk:tickets:read.
misalignments.release_implication: Release may include stale or unnecessary permission grants.

release_consequence.summary: 2 release-relevant finding(s) map to active release blockers; resolve required controls or remove the capability.

suggested_scenarios.title: Retry behavior for risky write
suggested_scenarios.given: Exercise the release path for gmail.send_customer_email, stripe.create_refund.
suggested_scenarios.expected_control: Retries use idempotency evidence or the side effect is not retried.

suggested_scenarios.title: Approval gate for high-risk action
suggested_scenarios.given: Exercise the release path for stripe.create_refund.
suggested_scenarios.expected_control: The run records human approval before the tool call and denies calls without approval.

suggested_scenarios.title: Tool schema boundary check
suggested_scenarios.given: Exercise the release path for gmail.send_customer_email, send_email_preview, stripe.create_refund, and 1 more tool(s).
suggested_scenarios.expected_control: The tool accepts bounded structured inputs and returns structured outputs where needed.

suggested_scenarios.title: High-risk tool validation case
suggested_scenarios.given: Exercise the release path for shopify.cancel_order.
suggested_scenarios.expected_control: A declared test or review scenario covers the high-risk tool path.

suggested_scenarios.title: Explicit tool inventory review
suggested_scenarios.given: Exercise the release path for wildcard_mcp_tools.*.
suggested_scenarios.expected_control: The release exposes a static allowlist instead of wildcard or unbounded tools.

suggested_scenarios.title: Confirmation gate for external or destructive action
suggested_scenarios.given: Exercise the release path for gmail.send_customer_email, stripe.create_refund.
suggested_scenarios.expected_control: The run records explicit confirmation before the side effect occurs.

suggested_scenarios.title: Prohibited-action guard
suggested_scenarios.given: Exercise the release path for gmail.send_customer_email, stripe.create_refund.
suggested_scenarios.expected_control: The prohibited action is blocked, removed, or covered by the stated control.

suggested_scenarios.title: Least-privilege scope review
suggested_scenarios.given: Exercise the release path for gmail.send_customer_email, shopify.cancel_order, support.search_kb.
suggested_scenarios.expected_control: Manifest and tool scopes match the narrow permissions needed for the release.

findings.title: Wildcard tool exposure declared
findings.recommendation: Replace wildcard tool exposure with an explicit tool allowlist before release review.

findings.title: stripe.create_refund.amount has no maximum bound
findings.recommendation: Add a maximum bound to stripe.create_refund.amount or document an equivalent limit in the tool policy.

findings.title: zendesk.update_ticket accepts broad free-form action input
findings.recommendation: Constrain zendesk.update_ticket.updates with an enum, structured schema, or narrower field-specific parameters.

findings.title: gmail.send_customer_email accepts broad free-form action input
findings.recommendation: Constrain gmail.send_customer_email.body with an enum, structured schema, or narrower field-specific parameters.

findings.title: send_email_preview returns free-form text output
findings.recommendation: Prefer a structured output schema for send_email_preview, especially when output is later passed back into model context.

findings.title: Manifest declares broad permission scopes
findings.recommendation: Replace broad manifest permission scopes with the narrowest scopes needed for this release.

findings.title: shopify.cancel_order requires scopes not declared in the manifest
findings.recommendation: Add the required scopes for shopify.cancel_order to permissions.scopes or narrow the tool's declared auth requirements.

findings.title: support.search_kb requires scopes not declared in the manifest
findings.recommendation: Add the required scopes for support.search_kb to permissions.scopes or narrow the tool's declared auth requirements.

findings.title: gmail.send_customer_email requires scopes not declared in the manifest
findings.recommendation: Add the required scopes for gmail.send_customer_email to permissions.scopes or narrow the tool's declared auth requirements.

findings.title: stripe.create_refund appears to overlap with a prohibited action
findings.recommendation: Remove stripe.create_refund, narrow its policy, or revise prohibited_actions so the manifest and tool surface do not contradict each other.

findings.title: gmail.send_customer_email appears to overlap with a prohibited action
findings.recommendation: Remove gmail.send_customer_email, narrow its policy, or revise prohibited_actions so the manifest and tool surface do not contradict each other.

findings.title: stripe.create_refund lacks a declared approval policy
findings.recommendation: Declare an approval policy for stripe.create_refund or remove this tool from the release.

findings.title: stripe.create_refund lacks a declared confirmation policy
findings.recommendation: Declare a user confirmation policy for stripe.create_refund or remove this action from the release.

findings.title: gmail.send_customer_email lacks a declared confirmation policy
findings.recommendation: Declare a user confirmation policy for gmail.send_customer_email or remove this action from the release.

findings.title: stripe.create_refund lacks idempotency evidence
findings.recommendation: Add an idempotency key, idempotent annotation, or declared idempotency policy for stripe.create_refund.

findings.title: gmail.send_customer_email lacks idempotency evidence
findings.recommendation: Add an idempotency key, idempotent annotation, or declared idempotency policy for gmail.send_customer_email.

findings.title: shopify.cancel_order is high-risk but has no owner
findings.recommendation: Declare an owner for each high-risk production tool in risk_overrides.tools.

findings.title: Manifest declares unused permission scope zendesk:tickets:read
findings.recommendation: Remove unused manifest scopes or add tool metadata showing why they are required.

recommended_actions: Declare an approval policy for stripe.create_refund or remove this tool from the release.
Add an idempotency key, idempotent annotation, or declared idempotency policy for stripe.create_refund.
Replace broad manifest permission scopes with the narrowest scopes needed for this release.
Add the required scopes for shopify.cancel_order to permissions.scopes or narrow the tool's declared auth requirements.
Add the required scopes for support.search_kb to permissions.scopes or narrow the tool's declared auth requirements.
Add the required scopes for gmail.send_customer_email to permissions.scopes or narrow the tool's declared auth requirements.
Replace wildcard tool exposure with an explicit tool allowlist before release review.
Declare an owner for each high-risk production tool in risk_overrides.tools.
source_warnings: MCP source declares wildcard tool exposure
